name: Dessert Toppinglow-Fat (d)
recipeIngredient: Mixed frozen raspberries, strawberries, and blueberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a blender.
2. Puree on high speed until smooth and creamy.
3. Transfer mixture to a saucepan.
4. Cook over medium heat, whisking frequently, until sauce thickens (about 10 to 12 minutes).
5. Let cool slightly before serving.
6. Makes about 2 cups.
